Space layout: 5-6 retail units along a covered walkway + shared storage + restroom core
Description: A strip mall / supermarket located in Guangzhou, China. The building footprint is approximately 48.3 m (east-west) by 48.3 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 135 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 3500.0 m^2 spread over 1 floor(s), giving roughly 2333.3 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 4.5 m. The building is divided into 14 thermal zones in total (about 9 per floor). Typical space layout: 5-6 retail units along a covered walkway + shared storage + restroom core. Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 40% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
